amendments.text: [A drain [or drains] must be provided to allow safe drainage of the oil system. Each drain must-- (a) Be accessible; and (b) Have manual or automatic means for positive locking in the closed position.] 80-21; Issued on 11/10/80. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 80-21; Issued on 11/10/80. 16919; Issued on 12/16/83. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 16919; Issued on 12/16/83.
